task.name: Create User model
task.action: Create User struct with Codable conformance. Implement UserRepository with GRDB persistence. Follow offline-first pattern from TECH-SPEC.md.
task.verify: Unit test: UserRepositoryTests — insert, fetch, delete pass
task.done: User model persists to local DB with full CRUD

task.name: Create login endpoint
task.action: Use Firebase Auth for authentication. Store session in Keychain per TECH-SPEC.md § Security. Handle offline: queue login attempt, retry on connectivity.
task.verify: Login with test credentials returns valid session token
task.done: User can log in; session persists across app restarts

task.name: Configure Firebase project
task.action: User must: 1. Create Firebase project at console.firebase.google.com 2. Download GoogleService-Info.plist 3. Add to Xcode project root
task.done: Firebase SDK initialized on app launch
